goal: Find where a large document corpus defines renewal policy exceptions.

surfaceMap.evidence: Relevant terms appear in renewal and operations policy folders.

hypotheses.claim: Renewal exceptions are defined in the renewal policy.
Manual override policy owns exception procedure.

deepDives.finding: Renewal policy references exceptions but delegates procedure to manual override policy.
Manual override policy defines exception criteria, approval owner, and audit evidence.

replanLog.decision: Promote H2 because H1 delegated the procedure to manual overrides.
replanLog.evidence: D1 found explicit delegation instead of local exception rules.

stopCondition.evidence: H2 confirmed the exception procedure owner and rules.

deliverable: Renewal exception procedure lives in policies/operations/manual-overrides.md, not in the renewal policy itself.
risks: Only two policy files were read; downstream implementation docs may contain additional examples.
